phase1_gtd.name: GTD (Guaranteed)
phase1_gtd.description: Leaderboard above threshold (>=1017 pts). Guaranteed mint.

phase2_community.name: Community
phase2_community.description: Partner collection holders who claimed via kommuntitty page.

phase4_public.name: Public
phase4_public.description: Open to everyone. Also mintable on OpenSea.

deployment.test: Base mainnet (test OpenSea + website minting with WL phases)
deployment.fallback: ETH Sepolia (website-only minting if Base+OpenSea combo fails)

notes.phaseStacking: GTD=1, Community=1, FCFS=1, Public=3. Max 6 per wallet across all phases.
